title: Otstar Latest Jar Opener for Seniors with Arthritis, Weak Hands, Multi-function Bottle Opener with Non Slip Rubber Jar Opener Gripper Pad and Corkscrew Wine Opener
description:
About this item
Package contains: a 6-in-1 jar opener, a 5-in-1 bottle opener, a silicone jar opener gripper pad, a corkscrew opener. Open any jar,can and bottle with ease, including various vacuum sealed jars (such as jam, honey,spaghetti sauce, fruit jars), pickle jars, milk/soda/beer/water bottles, canned food with pull tabs such as canned fish, canned soup, canned cat food, and wine.
Latest Design 6-in-1 jar opener --Eight sizes of circular openings make the jar opener extremely convenient to opens lids 1-3 inches in diameter, and the Mouth-shaped hook on top helps to open large-size lid by breaking air tightness, another hook helps to open ring pull cans.Rubber lining grips tight to slippery surfaces, and it's lever action gives anyone the strength to open tight jars with our jar lids opener.
5 IN 1 Jar Opener and Bottle Opener.Can open lids for the bean cans, covers of the pickle bottles & caps of the sodas & soft drinks. Easily twist off screw caps with a simple twist. Clamp down on food seals to instantly remove pull tabs, no more breaking nails trying to peel the lids off of any canned food.
Premium Silicone Jar Opener Gripper Pad. Our Square Silicone Jar Gripper is anti-skid and waterproof which provide superior grip when opening stubborn jars and containers. It can also be used as hot pads, trivet mats, or pot holders.
The waiters corkscrew opener is a classic corkscrew design that has a two stage cork lifter and bottle opener. Open a bottle by twisting in the screw, placing the openers shortest step on the top of the bottle lip and pivoting up the handle.
PERFECT GIFT FOR YOUR LOVED ONES :This jar and bottle opener set makes a great living aid for seniors ,arthritis sufferers or anyone with low strength, It is the perfect gift for your Mom, Dad, Grandma, Grandpa or friends who struggle with jars and bottles.
How To Use: Please refer to the pictures on the sides of the package. Please be assured that we provide a 2-year quality warranty, if any quality problems or need help, please feel free to contact us, we will give you a satisfactory solution.
reviews_5s:
We are an older couple, and recently have needed a good jar opener. My wife has used the opener for cans, all sizes of jars, small bottles, and can tab tops. We had tried to use another opener, but it was worthless and fell apart. This product is very well built, is versatile for all types of opening jobs, is priced very fairly, and does not require a great deal of effort to use it. Highly recommended.I have serious arthritis in my hands and opening any jar or package is very difficult. I found these products to work extremely well, especially the bottle/jar openers. I would recommend this set if you have pain or weakness in your hands. Great investment.My wife loves this. Easy to use and always does the job.Arthritis makes it hard to open jars. This jar opens is a live saver.As someone who has recently started struggling with arthritic pain, opening certain jars has become a significant challenge. I ordered this jar opener set to see if it could help, and it has been a great addition to my kitchen. The set comes with three tools designed to conquer any stuck or hard-to-open lid, as well as an additional corkscrew wine opener.I've tried these tools on various jar sizes, and for the first time in a while, I didn't need to ask for help. Each tool is designed to provide a firm grip and ample leverage, making it easy to open even the most stubborn jars. Cleaning and storing them is a breeze, too, which is a nice bonus.If you have trouble opening jars due to arthritis or other issues, I highly recommend giving this set a try. It has certainly made my life a lot easier.I like this product alot! It can open a lid off a jar of pickles which is very difficult to do !
It can open a jar of pickles with ease. Highly recommend.

It can even open a jar of pickles which can be very difficult. Highly recommend.Its great for my elderly parents. They had a hard time opening their water bottles and medicines but with the opener they are able to open it with ease. Great quality and good price. BELIEVEI have used this a few times now. It has opened all the different size jars that I use. I had tried other types of openers but this is the best I have found. I recommend this.I bought this product primarily to open drink bottles. Some of them are open difficult to open with bare hands. This product makes it a breeze. Requires much less effort!!Works very well, And this is no lie, my wife doesn't need me to help her open cans, bottles or jars anymore!
reviews_1s:
I bought this due to arthritis in my hands. It is not at all helpful in that it doesn’t have a grip on the lids. I would not recommend.I cannot get to open anything. Baffled by those that say it works. Had it for 8 months now and don't think it opened anything. Maybe it only works on certain jar lids. No Clue but it is worthless for me.The large tool has no flexability. I guess you just put it over a jar lid that is close to the size of the opening on the tool. It was not helpful for me.Useless for any lid larger than 2 inches in diameter. Save your money. Don't know why Amazon won't
let you give a zero rating.this was so disappointing that it does not work on anything we triedI grew up with something similar and it wasn't fancy and had all the coating on it. This is a waste of money nothing will grip to it and getting the jars in the select size is a disaster. This is the mose useless kitchen product. Don't let the look fool you it's really a bad product. Even the bottle opener sucks. I don't normally leave a bad review but I had to save a few people from purchasing this so they can find a better product.Don’t waste your money in this. The only item of real use is the flat square rubber mat item. The others don’t work.I fell for the ads and disappointed I trusted Amazon. The thing is impossible to use! I tried and tried and thought I could conquer it IF I KEPT TRYING, and so am NOW PAST the DEADLINE TO RETURN it. . From now on, I will be more wary of believing in Amazon. If Amazon cannot give you a refund and has to put a due date to return an item that doesn't work...it says NOTHING FAVORABLE OR TRUTHFUL about Amazon. They should stand behind their merchandise, PERIOD! I see by the reviews I am not the only one who doesn't like it and fell for the false advertising. If it is easy for you to use this tool, you already have the strength and dexterity to not need the tool; so now you have a new tool in your kitchen drawer.I was not able to open anything. I want to return my items and they sent 2 off them and I only ordered one.I should have paid attention to the reviews. I purchased these to help my grip due to a little loss of strength. The problem is that you still need strength for these to work. Purpose defeated.
